task_completion.description: Open the Sygic GPS Navigation application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app is launched and visible on the screen.
The main Settings menu of the Sygic app is displayed.
The 'View & Units' submenu is open and its contents are visible.
The 'Map font size' option is visible on the screen within the settings list.

task_completion.description: Change the Map font size to 'Large'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Map font size' setting is explicitly shown as set to 'Large' (e.g., a selected radio button in a popup dialog, or the subtext under the 'Map font size' setting reads 'Large').

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change the setting
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI interactions within the Sygic app, without the use of terminal emulators or command-line interfaces.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Sygic GPS Navigation application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the genuine Sygic app settings UI, not a text editor, web browser, or generic mock-up.

integrity.description: The setting was changed using the app's native selection controls
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Large' option is selected via a native UI element (like a dialog box or dropdown list) rather than just being typed into a search bar or text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target setting 'Map font size' is a real setting located in the 'View & Units' section of the Sygic GPS Navigation settings menu.
